MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE ACTIONS OF CASE(S) CGC-23-608470 WITH CASE CGC-20-588599
Off Calendar Jan-08-2024 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF TIFFANY PERKINS, JOYCE WORD MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE ACTIONS OF CASE(S) CGC-23-608470 WITH CASE CGC-20-588599

Plaintiffs' motion to consolidate cases CGC-20-588599 and CGC-23-608470 for all purposes is granted; the former shall be the lead case.

Both cases claim employment discrimination by the same management against African-American women in the same small department at a hospital at overlapping times. (See CCP 1048(a).) Counsel are also the same, and the trial date is a year out. The facts and legal allegations are not precisely identical in the two cases (they never are). But San Francisco jurors are intelligent and unlikely to be confused if the case is tried.
For the 9:30 a.m. Law & Motion calendar, all attorneys and parties may appear in Department 302 remotely. Remote hearings will be conducted by videoconference using Zoom. To appear remotely at the hearing, go to the court's website at sfsuperiorcourt.org under "Online Services," navigate to "Tentative Rulings," and click on the appropriate link, or dial the corresponding phone number.

Proposed order submitted.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer; Clerk: W. Trupek; Not Reported (302/RBU)
